$comment: Mobile Header Action Group Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Header Action Group component that groups action buttons and icons in mobile headers. Supports multiple variants including single/double/triple buttons, single/double/triple icons, and icon+button combinations. Includes optional badge indicators. Figma Reference: Node ID 55-29924

$component.name: Header Action Group
$component.description: A mobile header component that groups multiple action elements (buttons and/or icons) together. Supports various combinations including buttons only, icons only, or mixed icon+button layouts. Includes optional badge indicators for notifications or counts. Used in mobile app headers for primary actions and navigation.
$component.structure: Horizontal flex container with configurable gap spacing, containing action buttons and/or icon buttons. Optional badge indicators positioned absolutely on icon buttons. Buttons have primary subtle background with primary text, icons are neutral colored.

sizes.default: Standard size - buttons use 14px padding horizontal, 8px vertical. Icons are 32px square.

variants.double-button: Two action buttons grouped together with 8px gap
variants.single-icon: Single icon button (32px) with optional badge
variants.double-icon: Two icon buttons (32px each) with 10px gap and optional badge
variants.triple-icon: Three icon buttons (32px each) with 10px gap
variants.icon-button: Icon button (32px) + action button combination with 10px gap and optional badge

usage.contexts: Mobile app headers, navigation bars, action bars, toolbar components, header action areas
usage.features: Multiple action combinations, Badge indicators, Primary action styling, Icon-only actions, Button+icon combinations, Configurable spacing

container.$comment: Container tokens for mobile header action group - gap spacing between elements

button.description: Mobile header action group gap between buttons - 8px

icon.description: Mobile header action group gap between icons - 10px

icon-button.description: Mobile header action group gap between icon and button - 10px

button.$comment: Button tokens for mobile header action group - primary subtle style buttons

height.description: Mobile header action group button height (sm) - 32px

icon.$comment: Icon tokens for mobile header action group - icon-only buttons

size.description: Mobile header action group icon size - 32px

color.description: Mobile header action group icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

badge.$comment: Badge tokens for mobile header action group - notification/count indicators on icons

size.description: Mobile header action group badge size - 16px

position.$comment: Badge positioning relative to icon - absolute positioning offsets

x.description: Mobile header action group badge horizontal offset from icon edge - 16px

y.description: Mobile header action group badge vertical offset from icon top - 0px
